title: Crash on REPLACE INTO of a table with an AFTER DELETE trigger.
poc: CREATE TABLE t0(a, b, c UNIQUE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX i0 ON t0(b) WHERE a;

CREATE TRIGGER tr0 AFTERE DELETE ON t0 BEGIN
  DELETE FROM t0;
key_bug_features: REPLACE INTO with AFTER DELETE trigger causes assertion fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_t0(a, b, c UNIQUE);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX fuzz_sqlite_i0 ON fuzz_sqlite_t0(b) WHERE a;
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_tr0 AFTER DELETE ON fuzz_sqlite_t0 BEGIN DELETE FROM fuzz_sqlite_t0; END;
